author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Sega plans shift to influencers after Sonic and Shinobi sales disappoint, despite strong reviews Plus, Sega has two unannounced 'flagship IP' games coming soon

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: OD has a secret system to help players too scared to keep playing, Kojima says Kojima shares new OD image and claims it’s scarier than any other game

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Steam Machine costs over $1,000, ‘significantly more’ than Valve originally wanted to charge A 2TB model with a Steam Controller costs more than $1,400

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Warframe dev says the end of Destiny 2 content is ‘heartbreaking’ and not being celebrated by its rival "A game is healthy when you have competitors"

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Former Eidos-Montréal manager says industry bosses are ‘much more Excel than passion-driven’ these days "They don't have the same DNA of the decision makers 15 years ago"

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: ‘This era has come to a close’: Unreal Engine veteran leaves Epic Games, says the industry is at ‘a pivotal point’ Sjoerd De Jong suggests "the old way of working" is being replaced

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Final Fantasy 7 Revelation director says his next game won’t be a remake, but could be a ‘grand-scale’ RPG Naoki Hamaguchi wants a new challenge, "whether it be Final Fantasy or a different IP"

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: CDProjekt Red CEO says Cyberpunk didn’t finish its ‘redemption arc’, hopes The Witcher 4 will win over those who ‘lost faith’ "We lost the faith of some people indefinitely, and that's a fair thing"

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: Pokémon and Aardman share more details on its upcoming Misadventures of Sirfetch’d & Pichu animation The project will take place in the Galar region

author: Video Games Chronicle
text: If players are happy just watching a stream then the game isn’t good enough, Shinji Mikami reportedly says The Resident Evil creator is said to have shared his thoughts with a Japanese comedian
